items.title: Lots of major improvements to Codex! Computer use is a real update for me; it feels even more u…
items.content: Lots of major improvements to Codex! Computer use is a real update for me; it feels even more useful than I expected. It can use all of the apps on your Mac, in parallel and without interfering with your direct work.

items.title: To celebrate 3 million weekly codex users, we are resetting usage limits. We will do this every…
